expert.name: Tim Ferriss
expert.bio: Author of The 4-Hour Body, The 4-Hour Workweek, and Tools of Titans. Pioneer of self-experimentation and biohacking. Known for minimum effective dose approach and testing unconventional protocols.

supplements.name: Slow-Carb Pagg Stack - Policosanol
supplements.description: Part of PAGG stack for fat loss from The 4-Hour Body

supplements.name: Slow-Carb Pagg Stack - Alpha Lipoic Acid
Slow-Carb Pagg Stack - Green Tea Extract (EGCG)
supplements.description: Catechins for metabolic boost and fat oxidation

supplements.name: Magnesium
supplements.description: Essential mineral for sleep and recovery

supplements.name: Vitamin D3
supplements.description: Critical for testosterone and overall health

supplements.name: Creatine Monohydrate
supplements.description: Simple, effective for strength and cognition

supplements.name: BCAAs (during fasted training)
supplements.description: Preserve muscle during fasted training windows

protocols.name: Slow-Carb Diet
protocols.description: Simple rules for sustainable fat loss without counting calories. Focus on 'good enough' compliance over perfection.
rules: Avoid white carbohydrates (bread, rice, pasta, potatoes, grains)
Eat the same few meals repeatedly
Don't drink calories (no juice, soda, milk)
Don't eat fruit (except tomatoes and avocados)
Take one day off per week (cheat day)

cheat_day.guidelines: Eat whatever you want. Grapefruit juice and caffeine before. Start with protein.

protocols.name: Minimum Effective Dose Training
protocols.description: Get maximum results with minimum time investment. Quality over quantity.
principles: One set to failure often sufficient for hypertrophy
Slow cadence (5 seconds up, 5 seconds down) for time under tension

protocols.name: Kettlebell Swing Protocol
protocols.description: Two exercises, 30 minutes per week for remarkable body recomposition
protocols.rationale: Posterior chain development, hip power, grip strength, cardiovascular conditioning all in one efficient movement

protocols.name: Cold Thermogenesis Protocol
protocols.description: Use cold exposure to activate brown fat and increase calorie burn

progression.protocol: Cold showers 2-3 minutes, back of neck and upper back
Ice packs on upper back/neck 20-30 min while working

protocols.timing: Morning optimal for metabolic boost. Can combine with fat-burning supplements.

protocols.name: Pre-Cheat Day Damage Control
protocols.description: Minimize fat storage from cheat day indulgences
protocol: Grapefruit juice first thing (naringin for metabolic effects)
Brief squats or wall presses before meals (GLUT4 translocation)

protocols.name: Sleep Optimization - Biohacking Sleep
protocols.description: Rapid sleep onset and deep sleep optimization

tactics.temperature: Cold room (65-67F), hot bath 90 min before bed
tactics.half_military_crawl: Position for rapid sleep onset (one arm up, opposite leg up)
tactics.timing: Same bedtime within 30 minutes, even weekends
tactics.light: No screens 1 hour before bed, f.lux on devices

optimization.rem: Consistent wake time, no alarm if possible

protocols.name: Morning Routine - Titanium Tea
protocols.description: Optimal morning beverage for focus and fat burning

recipe.base: Pu-erh aged black tea or green tea

protocols.timing: First thing in morning, before food

protocols.name: Testosterone Optimization - Natural Protocol
protocols.description: Natural methods to optimize testosterone from 4-Hour Body

interventions.action: Fermented cod liver oil + butter oil

interventions.name: Cold Showers
interventions.description: Daily cold exposure for metabolic and mood benefits
interventions.protocol: End shower with coldest water tolerable. Focus on back of neck, upper back, chest.
interventions.rationale: Brown fat activation, dopamine/norepinephrine release, mental toughness

interventions.name: Ice Baths/Cold Plunge
interventions.description: Extended cold exposure for fat loss and recovery
interventions.timing: Morning for fat burning, evening for sleep (controversial)

interventions.name: Pre-Meal Air Squats
interventions.description: Brief exercise before meals to improve glucose uptake
interventions.protocol: 30-50 air squats or wall presses before eating, especially high-carb meals
interventions.rationale: GLUT4 translocation to muscle cell surface allows glucose uptake without insulin

interventions.name: Cissus Quadrangularis Protocol
interventions.description: Traditional Ayurvedic herb for joint and bone healing
interventions.rationale: Accelerates fracture and soft tissue healing. Used by Tim for injury recovery.

nutrition_principles.topic: Calories Don't Matter (If You Follow Rules)
nutrition_principles.guidance: On Slow-Carb, focus on food choices not calorie counting. Protein and fiber naturally regulate appetite.
nutrition_principles.details: Eat until satisfied, not stuffed. Impossible to overeat on compliant foods if eating slowly.

nutrition_principles.guidance: Decision fatigue kills diets. Pick 3-4 meals you like and rotate.
nutrition_principles.details: Simplicity enables compliance. Variety is overrated for fat loss. Save creativity for cheat day.

nutrition_principles.guidance: Protein first thing sets up metabolic dominoes for the day.
nutrition_principles.details: Eggs are ideal. 3-4 whole eggs with legumes. Stabilizes blood sugar, reduces cravings all day.

nutrition_principles.guidance: Cheat day is strategic, not just psychological. Spikes leptin, resets metabolism.
nutrition_principles.details: Go big. The bigger the better for hormonal effect. One day won't ruin weeks of progress. Use damage control protocol.

nutrition_principles.guidance: No juice, soda, milk, or caloric beverages. Exception: red wine 1-2 glasses on some slow-carb versions.
nutrition_principles.details: Liquid calories don't trigger satiety. Easy to consume hundreds of calories without noticing. Stick to water, tea, black coffee.
